Tests the behavior of Number.prototype.toFixed with a non-integer argument.

# Purpose
This code is a test assertion that checks the behavior of the `toFixed` method on the `Number` prototype in JavaScript. The test verifies that calling `toFixed` with a non-integer argument, specifically `0.9`, results in the string `"0"`. This test ensures that the `toFixed` method correctly handles non-integer input by converting it to an integer, as per the ECMAScript specification. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of the `toFixed` method's behavior.
